one_liner: Firecrawl is a web scraping/crawling API that turns websites into LLM-ready markdown/JSON, with self-serve API key signup, a free tier, keyless rate-limited access, and an official MCP server.

auth_methods.notes: Bearer token format: Authorization: Bearer fc-YOUR-API-KEY, obtained from Firecrawl dashboard
Some agent platforms may use WorkOS ID-JAG identity assertions for credential registration; MCP server also supports OAuth bearer token

self_serve_notes: Free tier with 1,000 monthly credits available via signup (API key) or fully keyless mode (no account needed, IP-capped, basic scrape/search only). Paid plans start at $16/month for higher limits.

api_surface.notes: Endpoints for scrape, batch/scrape, crawl, map, extract, search, deep-research/agent, browser sessions, and billing/usage. SDKs available for Python and Node.

evidence.supports: Bearer token auth via Authorization header, API key from dashboard, WorkOS ID-JAG alternative, REST endpoints list (scrape, parse, crawl, map, search, agent, browser)
Full REST API endpoint list including scrape, batch/scrape, crawl, map, extract, search, deep-research, billing; API key signup process
Free tier with 1,000 monthly credits, keyless mode, paid plans starting $16/month
Keyless mode allows CLI/MCP/SDK usage without API key or account, capped per IP
Python SDK usage with API key or FIRECRAWL_API_KEY env var
